name: Jiffy Yeast Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1 Combine first 4 ingredients.
2 Dissolve yeast with 1 teaspoon sugar in water and add to the mixture.
3 Add egg and enough flour so that dough can be kneaded on a board.
4 Roll into small balls and place 3 in greased muffin tins.
5 Cover and let rise until doubled in size.
6 Bake at 425°F for 12 or 15 minutes.
